description: Introducing these amazing thermal Xmas tights with grippers for baby girls. An absolute essential during the winter and autumn months. They will keep your babe warm, and grippers will allow your child to move safely around the house. A great simple Xmas print made them the perfect for a Christmas gift to your child. You can choose from 2 colours - Reindeer or Santa, sizes 0-24 month. Get one for your baby girl. Or even both!
